reminder.notes:
Release v2.18.27

A one-time "what's new" prompt now explains the location-based reminders feature after updating, with a clear skip option (dismissible by button or tapping outside) for anyone who'd rather not read it.

ai-scanner.notes: Diagnostic release: Find Duplicates now shows the real cause of a skipped delete instead of always saying "permission declined" -- surfaces exception text or the actual system-approved/requested count. Also fixes the vendored photo_manager plugin replying with the wrong id list on a system-approved delete.
